text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow... the autumn Tenno Sho is finally here. So,
who are you rooting for?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash, of course! She did great in the
Derby, plus how cool would it be to see the
Derby champion win the fall Tenno too?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I wonder if Special Week will win. I really hope she does!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
No, no, check out Grass Wonder! If she runs at a
hundred percent, she's gonna win this one for
sure!

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Rob Roy! Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: Jordan's fall Tenno is just about to start...

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text: You've got this... Go get 'em, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You nervy, Helios?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, I want her to win. She's been working
so hard...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: She'll win.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Jordan's got this. I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: City...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... that's right. We gotta believe in her, in
our friend's strength!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Show us how you run.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? So, um, I've been thinking about this
past year, and...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's been like, kinda silly, huh? I spent weeks just
splashing around in the pool, and Bakushin-ing
around with Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, just the fact that Golshi is my rival is pretty cringe. And even worse, we're fighting over who's dumber...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But... thanks to you, I was able to run farther than
I ever thought I could. Like in the spring Tenno.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I think I learned that wanting to win is really
important too. And I'm not afraid of any of the
other racers anymore, no matter who they are.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, um... I want you to keep believing in me until
the end.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run faster than any Umamusume that's
ever been.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'll run so fast they'll have to rewrite all the history
books, and everyone'll be copying me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do the dumbest thing ever. And I need
you to think it's cool.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aha... I can't.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Anyway, leave it to me.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now, which Umamusume will be the one to leave
her mark in the annals of history?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The strongest, most talented, and most beloved
runners are all gathered in the paddock!

text_block_list.name: Spectator F
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Tosen Jordan! I saw her press conference the
other day!

text_block_list.name: Spectator G
text_block_list.text:
She's popular... but how talented is she? I think
some of the others might be better...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Think whatever you want, but you better watch
the race carefully.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Watch me win.
